appraisal_events.evidence: « Je ne vous le conseille pas... retournez-vous sur votre oreiller et dormez... notre garce de musique va passer sous vos fenêtres... nous nous reverrons ce soir à dîner. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Robert de Saint-Loup is depicted taking considerate, competent charge—protecting the narrator’s rest, speaking with practical authority as a soldier, and arranging to meet later. The narration later aligns with the value of rest, reinforcing his guidance.

status_effects.explanation: He comes off as caring and judicious, with a calm, authoritative tone that the passage implicitly validates.
